Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.episteme.core.measure
  2. Unit

Uses of Interface
org.episteme.core.measure.Unit

Packages that use Unit
Package
Description
org.episteme.core.measure
Implements a comprehensive units framework enabling type-safe
org.episteme.core.measure.adapters
 
org.episteme.core.measure.metrology
Implements the science of measurement following ISO/IEC Guide
org.episteme.core.measure.units
 
org.episteme.core.ui
User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.
org.episteme.natural.earth.seismology
 
org.episteme.natural.physics
Covers:
org.episteme.natural.ui.viewers.devices
Provides JavaFX-based visual representations of physical
org.episteme.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.episteme.social.history.clock
Provides the org.episteme.social.history.time module.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Unit<Q>
    StandardUnit.add(double offset)
    Returns a unit equal to this unit shifted by the specified offset.
    default <R extends Quantity<R>>
    Unit<R>
    Unit.asType(Class<R> type)
    Casts this unit to a specific quantity type.
    Unit<Q>
    StandardUnit.divide(double divisor)
     
    Unit<?>
    StandardUnit.divide(Unit<?> other)
     
    default Unit<Q>
    Unit.divide(double factor)
    Returns a unit equal to this unit divided by the specified factor.
    Unit<?>
    Unit.divide(Unit<?> other)
    Returns the quotient of this unit by another unit.
    Unit<Q>
    Quantity.getUnit()
    Returns the unit of measurement for this quantity.
    default Unit<?>
    Unit.inverse()
    Returns the inverse of this unit.
    Unit<Q>
    StandardUnit.multiply(double factor)
     
    Unit<?>
    StandardUnit.multiply(Unit<?> other)
     
    Unit<Q>
    Unit.multiply(double factor)
    Returns a unit equal to this unit multiplied by the specified factor.
    Unit<?>
    Unit.multiply(Unit<?> other)
    Returns the product of this unit with another unit.
    static Unit<?>
    Units.parseUnit(String symbol)
    Parses a unit from its symbol.
    Unit<?>
    StandardUnit.pow(int exponent)
     
    Unit<?>
    Unit.pow(int exponent)
    Returns this unit raised to the specified power.
    Unit<?>
    StandardUnit.sqrt()
     
    Unit<?>
    Unit.sqrt()
    Returns the square root of this unit.

    Description

    Creates a quantity from an int value and unit.

    Quantities.create(long value, Unit<Q> unit)
    Creates a quantity from a long value and unit.

    Quantity<Q>

    Creates a quantity from a Real value and unit.

    Unit.divide(Unit<?> other)
    Returns the quotient of this unit by another unit.
    default UnitConverter
    Unit.getConverterFrom(Unit<Q> sourceUnit)
    Returns a converter from the target unit to this unit.
    UnitConverter
    StandardUnit.getConverterTo(Unit<Q> targetUnit)
     
    UnitConverter
    Unit.getConverterTo(Unit<Q> targetUnit)
    Returns a converter to convert values from this unit to the target unit.
    default Real
    Quantity.getValue(Unit<Q> unit)
    Returns the value of this quantity in the specified unit.
    default boolean
    Unit.isCompatible(Unit<?> other)
    Checks if this unit is compatible with another unit.
    Unit<?>
    StandardUnit.multiply(Unit<?> other)
     
    Unit<?>
    Unit.multiply(Unit<?> other)
    Returns the product of this unit with another unit.

    Quantity<Q>
    Quantities.parse(String text, Unit<Q> expectedUnit)
    Parses a quantity from a string representation.
    Quantity<Q>
    Quantity.to(Unit<Q> targetUnit)
    Converts this quantity to the specified unit.

    EpistemeUnits.ANGSTROM

    ChineseTime.CHINESE_KE

    static final Unit<Time>
    ChineseTime.CHINESE_MILLISECOND
    Unit for one Chinese millisecond.

    ChineseTime.CHINESE_SECOND

    HexadecimalTime.HEX_DAY

    HexadecimalTime.HEX_HOUR
